title: Estimated Monthly Caregiving Cost
summary: Edit any number below — this updates automatically.

fields.label: In-home care hours per week
fields.hint: Paid help with daily tasks, companionship, or supervision

fields.label: Hourly rate for care
fields.hint: Varies by region and level of care needed

fields.label: Medical supplies & equipment
fields.hint: Incontinence supplies, mobility aids, medication costs

formula: (hours/week × hourly rate × 4.33 weeks) + medical + transportation + other
regionNote: Costs vary significantly by region — these are editable starting assumptions, not fixed averages.
disclaimer: This is a planning estimate, not financial advice, and doesn't account for insurance, Medicaid, or veterans' benefits that may offset these costs.
